heading: Returns relating to the cancellation of indebtedness by certain entities
label: 6050P Returns relating to the cancellation of indebtedness by certain entities

children.text: the name, address, and TIN of each person whose indebtedness was discharged during such calendar year,
the date of the discharge and the amount of the indebtedness discharged, and
such other information as the Secretary may prescribe.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: b Exception
children.text: Subsection (a) shall not apply to any discharge of less than $600.

children.label: A
children.text: an executive, judicial, or legislative agency (as defined in , United States Code), andsection 3701(a)(4) of title 31

children.label: A
children.text: any financial institution described in section 581 or 591(a) and any credit union,

children.label: B
children.text: the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation, the Resolution Trust Corporation, the National Credit Union Administration, and any other Federal executive agency (as defined in section 6050M), and any successor or subunit of any of the foregoing,

children.label: C
children.text: any other corporation which is a direct or indirect subsidiary of an entity referred to in subparagraph (A) but only if, by virtue of being affiliated with such entity, such other corporation is subject to supervision and examination by a Federal or State agency which regulates entities referred to in subparagraph (A), and

children.label: D
children.text: any organization a significant trade or business of which is the lending of money.

children.heading: Governmental units
children.label: 3 Governmental units
children.text: In the case of an entity described in paragraph (1)(A) or (2)(B), any return under this section shall be made by the officer or employee appropriately designated for the purpose of making such return.

children.heading: Statements to be furnished to persons with respect to whom information is required to be furnished
children.label: d Statements to be furnished to persons with respect to whom information is required to be furnished

children.text: the name and address of the entity required to make such return, and
the information required to be shown on the return with respect to such person.

children.heading: Alternative procedure
children.label: e Alternative procedure
children.text: In lieu of making a return required under subsection (a), an agency described in subsection (c)(1)(A) may submit to the Secretary (at such time and in such form as the Secretary may by regulations prescribe) information sufficient for the Secretary to complete such a return on behalf of such agency. Upon receipt of such information, the Secretary shall complete such return and provide a copy of such return to such agency.
